title: cerastium decalvans f. isophyllum
intro: Cerastium decalvans f. isophyllum, also known as a form of the Alpine or Snow-in-Mountains plant, is a flowering plant that belongs to the carnation family. It is rich in flavonoids, particularly quercetin, and other compounds with potential medicinal properties. Traditionally, Cerastium decalvans f. isophyllum has been used to treat various health issues, including inflammation and respiratory problems, and its extracts have been shown to exhibit antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. Herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, can be made from the plant's leaves and flowers, which are used to soothe coughs, calm digestive issues, and support the immune system.
